subject: fix(review): address code review findings from branch audit
body:
- Fix tabContent useMemo depending on entire `state` object (new ref
  every render defeated memoization) — now uses specific state slices
- Fix z-index collision: overflow menu raised to z-40/z-50, above
  BottomSheet backdrop (z-30)
- Fix stale closure in handleCanvasTouchEnd: reads activePage from
  keyboardRef instead of closure, preventing missed swipes on rapid input
- Add max-height to BottomSheet (100dvh - 6rem) so it can't overlap
  header/ContextBar on short viewports
- Clean dead responsive classes in desktop-only path (flex-col-reverse,
  p-4 pb-24, lg: prefixes that never applied since desktop is >= 1024px)
- Add ARIA role="menu" and role="presentation" to overflow menu

Tags: mobile, performance, a11y, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-redesign
Semver: patch

title: address code review findings from branch audit
